sectionOrderRules: Hero must include business type, location if known and a primary CTA.
Trust proof must appear before the final CTA.
Sections should not repeat the same value proposition.
Services intro must connect business identity to the offered services.
Service list items must be concrete, not generic.
About story must be specific and human, not generic 'we are passionate about quality' copy.
Phone, email and address must all be present and not be lorem placeholders.
